title: Hexified
description: basically a magic mod with some automation mixed in
body:
Okay, now that I've read the rules.
here is what my modpack does.
it takes a bunch of magic mods and combines them into one modpack, this whole modpack is made so that people can feel like they are a wizard in a magical world.
It adds relics and artifacts.
the best magic mod: Hex casting 
create and some create addons.
performance enhancers
etc



there are a few mods I can't Include, due to them being on curseforge.

I'll include them here if you want to add them

Chipped (on modrinth but needs the connected texture mod to work)
https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped

Connected texture mod
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ctm/files?page=1&pageSize=20

CIT Reforged (really useful if you want to make custom looking hex casting artifacts)
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-reforged

Immersive portals (breaks create trains going through portals but is very magical)
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-portals-for-forge
